ogs_structural.title: Game Structural Topology
ogs_structural.description: Full game topology with all flows — decision games, functions, and feedback loops.
ogs_structural.mermaid:
%%{init: {'flowchart': {'nodeSpacing': 50, 'rankSpacing': 60}}}%%
flowchart TD
    Alice_Decision["Alice Decision"]
    Bob_Decision["Bob Decision"]
    Payoff_Computation(["Payoff Computation"])
    Alice_Decision -->|"Alice Action"| Payoff_Computation
    Bob_Decision -->|"Bob Action"| Payoff_Computation
    Payoff_Computation -.->|"Alice Payoff"| Alice_Decision
    Payoff_Computation -.->|"Bob Payoff"| Bob_Decision
    Payoff_Matrix -->|"Payoff Matrix"| Payoff_Computation

ogs_architecture_by_role.title: Architecture by Role
ogs_architecture_by_role.description: Games grouped by GameType (decision, covariant function, etc.).
ogs_architecture_by_role.mermaid:
%%{init: {'flowchart': {'nodeSpacing': 50, 'rankSpacing': 80}}}%%
flowchart TD
    subgraph decision [Decision]
        Alice_Decision["Alice Decision"]
        Bob_Decision["Bob Decision"]
    end
    subgraph function_covariant [Function Covariant]
        Payoff_Computation["Payoff Computation"]
    end
    Alice_Decision -->|"Alice Action"| Payoff_Computation
    Bob_Decision -->|"Bob Action"| Payoff_Computation
    Payoff_Computation -->|"Alice Payoff"| Alice_Decision
    Payoff_Computation -->|"Bob Payoff"| Bob_Decision
    Payoff_Matrix -->|"Payoff Matrix"| Payoff_Computation

ogs_architecture_by_domain.title: Architecture by Domain
ogs_architecture_by_domain.description: Games grouped by domain tag (Alice, Bob, Environment).
ogs_architecture_by_domain.mermaid:
%%{init: {'flowchart': {'nodeSpacing': 50, 'rankSpacing': 80}}}%%
flowchart TD
    subgraph dom_Alice ["Alice"]
        Alice_Decision["Alice Decision"]
    end
    subgraph dom_Bob ["Bob"]
        Bob_Decision["Bob Decision"]
    end
    subgraph dom_Environment ["Environment"]
        Payoff_Computation["Payoff Computation"]
    end
    Alice_Decision -->|"Alice Action"| Payoff_Computation
    Bob_Decision -->|"Bob Action"| Payoff_Computation
    Payoff_Computation -->|"Alice Payoff"| Alice_Decision
    Payoff_Computation -->|"Bob Payoff"| Bob_Decision
    Payoff_Matrix -->|"Payoff Matrix"| Payoff_Computation

ogs_hierarchy.title: Composition Hierarchy
ogs_hierarchy.description: Nested composition tree showing sequential, parallel, and feedback structure.
ogs_hierarchy.mermaid:
%%{init: {'flowchart': {'nodeSpacing': 40, 'rankSpacing': 50}}}%%
flowchart TD
    group_1["Prisoner's Dilemma (feedback)"]
    group_2["Game Round (sequential)"]
    group_1 --> group_2
    group_3["Simultaneous Decisions (parallel)"]
    group_2 --> group_3
    leaf_Alice_Decision["Alice Decision"]
    group_3 --> leaf_Alice_Decision
    leaf_Bob_Decision["Bob Decision"]
    group_3 --> leaf_Bob_Decision
    leaf_Payoff_Computation["Payoff Computation"]
    group_2 --> leaf_Payoff_Computation

ogs_flow_topology.title: Flow Topology (Covariant)
ogs_flow_topology.description: Forward (covariant) flows only — useful for data flow analysis.
ogs_flow_topology.mermaid:
%%{init: {'flowchart': {'nodeSpacing': 50, 'rankSpacing': 60}}}%%
flowchart LR
    Alice_Decision["Alice Decision"]
    Bob_Decision["Bob Decision"]
    Payoff_Computation["Payoff Computation"]
    Payoff_Matrix["Payoff Matrix"]
    Alice_Decision -->|"Alice Action"| Payoff_Computation
    Bob_Decision -->|"Bob Action"| Payoff_Computation
    Payoff_Matrix -->|"Payoff Matrix"| Payoff_Computation

ogs_terminal_conditions.title: Terminal Conditions
ogs_terminal_conditions.description: State transition diagram showing all possible outcomes.
ogs_terminal_conditions.mermaid:
%%{init: {'flowchart': {'nodeSpacing': 50, 'rankSpacing': 60}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Running
    Running --> Mutual_Cooperation : Both players cooperate (Pareto optimal)
    Mutual_Cooperation : Mutual Cooperation
    note right of Mutual_Cooperation
        Pareto optimum — both receive reward
    end note
    Running --> Mutual_Defection : Both players defect (Nash equilibrium)
    Mutual_Defection : Mutual Defection
    note right of Mutual_Defection
        Dominant strategy equilibrium
    end note
    Running --> Alice_Exploits : Alice defects while Bob cooperates
    Alice_Exploits : Alice Exploits
    note right of Alice_Exploits
        Temptation vs sucker
    end note
    Running --> Bob_Exploits : Bob defects while Alice cooperates
    Bob_Exploits : Bob Exploits
    note right of Bob_Exploits
        Temptation vs sucker
    end note

gds_system.title: System Structure
gds_system.description: Flat block topology from SystemIR — blocks with role-based shapes and wiring edges.
gds_system.mermaid:
%%{init:{"theme":"neutral"}}%%
flowchart TD
    classDef boundary fill:#93c5fd,stroke:#2563eb,stroke-width:2px,color:#1e3a5f
    classDef policy fill:#fcd34d,stroke:#d97706,stroke-width:2px,color:#78350f
    classDef mechanism fill:#86efac,stroke:#16a34a,stroke-width:2px,color:#14532d
    classDef control fill:#d8b4fe,stroke:#9333ea,stroke-width:2px,color:#3b0764
    classDef generic fill:#cbd5e1,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:1px,color:#1e293b
    Alice_Decision[Alice Decision]:::generic
    Bob_Decision[Bob Decision]:::generic
    Payoff_Computation[Payoff Computation]:::generic
    Alice_Decision --Alice Action--> Payoff_Computation
    Bob_Decision --Bob Action--> Payoff_Computation
    Payoff_Computation ==Alice Payoff==> Alice_Decision
    Payoff_Computation ==Bob Payoff==> Bob_Decision
    Payoff_Matrix --Payoff Matrix--> Payoff_Computation

gds_system_hierarchy.title: System Hierarchy
gds_system_hierarchy.description: Hierarchical composition tree showing block nesting.
gds_system_hierarchy.mermaid:
%%{init:{"theme":"neutral"}}%%
flowchart TD
    classDef boundary fill:#93c5fd,stroke:#2563eb,stroke-width:2px,color:#1e3a5f
    classDef policy fill:#fcd34d,stroke:#d97706,stroke-width:2px,color:#78350f
    classDef mechanism fill:#86efac,stroke:#16a34a,stroke-width:2px,color:#14532d
    classDef control fill:#d8b4fe,stroke:#9333ea,stroke-width:2px,color:#3b0764
    classDef generic fill:#cbd5e1,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:1px,color:#1e293b
    Alice_Decision[Alice Decision]:::generic
    Bob_Decision[Bob Decision]:::generic
    Payoff_Computation[Payoff Computation]:::generic
    Alice_Decision --Alice Action--> Payoff_Computation
    Bob_Decision --Bob Action--> Payoff_Computation
    Payoff_Computation ==Alice Payoff==> Alice_Decision
    Payoff_Computation ==Bob Payoff==> Bob_Decision
    Payoff_Matrix --Payoff Matrix--> Payoff_Computation

gds_spec.title: Specification Architecture
gds_spec.description: Architecture-level view with blocks grouped by role, entity cylinders, and wiring edges.
gds_spec.mermaid:
%%{init:{"theme":"neutral"}}%%
flowchart TD
    classDef boundary fill:#93c5fd,stroke:#2563eb,stroke-width:2px,color:#1e3a5f
    classDef policy fill:#fcd34d,stroke:#d97706,stroke-width:2px,color:#78350f
    classDef mechanism fill:#86efac,stroke:#16a34a,stroke-width:2px,color:#14532d
    classDef control fill:#d8b4fe,stroke:#9333ea,stroke-width:2px,color:#3b0764
    classDef generic fill:#cbd5e1,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:1px,color:#1e293b
    classDef entity fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#475569,stroke-width:2px,color:#0f172a
    classDef param fill:#fdba74,stroke:#ea580c,stroke-width:2px,color:#7c2d12
    classDef state fill:#5eead4,stroke:#0d9488,stroke-width:2px,color:#134e4a
    classDef target fill:#fca5a5,stroke:#dc2626,stroke-width:2px,color:#7f1d1d
    classDef empty fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-width:1px,color:#475569
    subgraph boundary ["Boundary (U)"]
        Payoff_Matrix([Payoff Matrix]):::boundary
    end
    subgraph policy ["Policy (g)"]
        Alice_Decision[Alice Decision]:::policy
        Bob_Decision[Bob Decision]:::policy
        Payoff_Computation[Payoff Computation]:::policy
    end
    Alice_Decision --Alice Action Flow--> Payoff_Computation
    Bob_Decision --Bob Action Flow--> Payoff_Computation
    Payoff_Computation --Alice Payoff Flow--> Alice_Decision
    Payoff_Computation --Bob Payoff Flow--> Bob_Decision
    Payoff_Matrix --Payoff Matrix Flow--> Payoff_Computation
    style boundary fill:#dbeafe,stroke:#60a5fa,stroke-width:1px,color:#1e40af
    style policy fill:#fef3c7,stroke:#fbbf24,stroke-width:1px,color:#92400e

gds_canonical.title: Canonical Decomposition (h = f ∘ g)
gds_canonical.description: Formal GDS decomposition: state variables, boundary inputs, policies, mechanisms.
gds_canonical.mermaid:
%%{init:{"theme":"neutral"}}%%
flowchart LR
    classDef boundary fill:#93c5fd,stroke:#2563eb,stroke-width:2px,color:#1e3a5f
    classDef policy fill:#fcd34d,stroke:#d97706,stroke-width:2px,color:#78350f
    classDef mechanism fill:#86efac,stroke:#16a34a,stroke-width:2px,color:#14532d
    classDef control fill:#d8b4fe,stroke:#9333ea,stroke-width:2px,color:#3b0764
    classDef generic fill:#cbd5e1,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:1px,color:#1e293b
    classDef entity fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#475569,stroke-width:2px,color:#0f172a
    classDef param fill:#fdba74,stroke:#ea580c,stroke-width:2px,color:#7c2d12
    classDef state fill:#5eead4,stroke:#0d9488,stroke-width:2px,color:#134e4a
    classDef target fill:#fca5a5,stroke:#dc2626,stroke-width:2px,color:#7f1d1d
    classDef empty fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-width:1px,color:#475569
    X_t(["X_t"]):::state
    X_next(["X_{t+1}"]):::state
    subgraph U ["Boundary (U)"]
        Payoff_Matrix[Payoff Matrix]:::boundary
    end
    subgraph g ["Policy (g)"]
        Alice_Decision[Alice Decision]:::policy
        Bob_Decision[Bob Decision]:::policy
        Payoff_Computation[Payoff Computation]:::policy
    end
    X_t --> U
    U --> g
    g --> X_next
    style U fill:#dbeafe,stroke:#60a5fa,stroke-width:1px,color:#1e40af
    style g fill:#fef3c7,stroke:#fbbf24,stroke-width:1px,color:#92400e

gds_params.title: Parameter Influence
gds_params.description: Parameter (Θ) influence diagram: which parameters affect which blocks and entities.
gds_params.mermaid:
%%{init:{"theme":"neutral"}}%%
flowchart LR
    classDef boundary fill:#93c5fd,stroke:#2563eb,stroke-width:2px,color:#1e3a5f
    classDef policy fill:#fcd34d,stroke:#d97706,stroke-width:2px,color:#78350f
    classDef mechanism fill:#86efac,stroke:#16a34a,stroke-width:2px,color:#14532d
    classDef control fill:#d8b4fe,stroke:#9333ea,stroke-width:2px,color:#3b0764
    classDef generic fill:#cbd5e1,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:1px,color:#1e293b
    classDef entity fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#475569,stroke-width:2px,color:#0f172a
    classDef param fill:#fdba74,stroke:#ea580c,stroke-width:2px,color:#7c2d12
    classDef state fill:#5eead4,stroke:#0d9488,stroke-width:2px,color:#134e4a
    classDef target fill:#fca5a5,stroke:#dc2626,stroke-width:2px,color:#7f1d1d
    classDef empty fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-width:1px,color:#475569
    no_params[No parameters defined]:::empty
